heroHeadline: El Mayo Sentencing 11 Days Away; Culiacán Rehab Center Massacre Kills 8 — 570 Days of Cartel Civil War
heroSubtitle: 617 days of intra-cartel war since Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada's alleged kidnapping — 2,400+ homicides, 9,000+ families displaced. La Mayiza controls approximately 90% of former Chapitos territory. El Mayo's sentencing before Judge Brian Cogan is set for April 13, 2026, carrying mandatory life imprisonment and a $15 billion forfeiture; the US government's response to the defense memo is due April 6. In early April, Chapitos gunmen massacred 8 people at a Culiacán drug rehabilitation center. Chapitos security chief 'El Chuta' remains at large following his February 2026 Chicago narcoterrorism indictment. Semana Santa security operations with SEDENA/SEMAR/State Police active across Sinaloa.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, CBC News
